---
title: "Testing in Research Workflows"
subtitle:  Introductory training materials on testing in Python and R for research workflows.
image: homepage.png
year: 2026
---

I developed these materials in collaboration with **HDR UK** between **January and April 2026** as part of the STARS project.

I produced a quarto site and accompanying videos (*in development*) for the HDR UK Futures training platform to introduce researchers to testing in research workflows.

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://pythonhealthdatascience.github.io/stars-testing-intro/"
  title="STARS Testing website">
</iframe>
